name: Combat Wild Shape
description: You can Wild Shape as a Bonus Action.

name: Combat Wild Shape: Heal
description: While in Wild Shape you can expend one spell slot to regain 1d8 hip points per level of the spell slot expended.

name: Elemental Wild Shape
description: You can expend two uses of Wild Shape at the same time to transform into an air, earth, fire, or water elemental.

name: Thousand Forms
description: You can cast the Alter Self spell at will.

name: Balm of the Summer Court
description: You have a number of d6s equal to your druid level. As a bonus action, you can choose one creature you can see within 120 feet of you and spend a number of those d6s less than or equal to half your druid level. The target regains that many Hit Points, and also gains 1 temporary hit point per die spent. You regain all expended dice when you finish a long rest.

name: Hidden Paths
description: As a bonus action you can teleport yourself up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier and regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

name: Hidden Paths: Ally
description: As an action you can teleport a willing creature you touch up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier and regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

name: Spirit Totem
description: As a Bonus Action, you summon a spirit to a point you can see within 60 feet of you. The spirit creates an aura in a 30-foot radius around that point. The spirit persists for 1 minute or until you are Incapacitated. When you use this feature, choose a spirit from: Bear, Hawk, Unicorn. Each grants different benefits. Once you use this feature, you cannot use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

name: Spirit Totem: Move
description: As a Bonus Action, you can move your Spirit Toem up to 60 feet to a point you can see.

name: Spirit Totem: Hawk Spirit
description: When a creature makes an attack roll against a target in the spirit's aura, you can use your Reaction to grant advantage to that attack roll. In addition, you and your allies have advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks while in the aura.

name: Faithful Summons
description: If you are reduced to 0 hit points or incapacitated against your will, you immediately gain the benefits of Conjure Animals as if you had cast it at 9th level. It summons four beasts of your choice that are CR 2 or lower that appear within 20 feet of you. If they receive no commands from you, they protect you from harm and attack your foes. The spell lasts for 1 hour, requiring no concentation, or until you dismiss it (no action required). Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

name: Halo of Spores
description: When a creature you can see moves into a space within 10 feet of you, or starts its turn there, you can use your Reaction to deal 1d4 Necrotic damage unless is succeeds on a Constitution saving throw against your spell save DC. The damage increases to 1d6 at 6th level, ad8 and 10th level and 1d10 at 14th level.

name: Symbiotic Entity
description: As an Action you can expend a use of Wild Shape. You gain 4 temporary hit points for each Druid level. When you deal your Halo of Spores damage, roll the damage a second time and add it to the total. Your melee weapon attacks deal an extra 1d6 necrotic damage. These benefits last for 10 minutes, until you lose all of these Temporary Hit Points, or until you use Wild Shape again.
additionalEffects: 4x Druid level Temp HP. 2x Halo of Spores damage. +1d6 necrotic damage to melee attacks.

name: Fungal Infestation
description: If a Small or Medium beast or humanoid dies within 10 feet of you, you can use your reaction to animate it, causing it to stand up as a Zombie with 1 hit point. Its turn comes immediately after yours, and the only Action it can take is a single Attack action. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier per Long Rest.

name: Spreading Spores
description: As a Bonus Action while your Symbiotic Entity feature is active, you can hurl spores up to 30 feet away, where they swirl in a 10-foot Cube for 1 minute. They disappear early if you use this feature again, if you dismiss them as a Bonus Action, or if your Symbiotic Entity feature ends. While the cube of spores is active, you can't use your Halo of Spores Reaction. Whenever a creature moves into the cube or starts its turn there it must pass a Constitution saving throw or takes your Halo of Spores damage. A creature can only take this damage once per turn.
